name: BRUKER CORP
summary: Bruker Corporation develops, manufactures, and distributes high-performance scientific instruments and analytical solutions enabling exploration of life and materials at microscopic, molecular, and cellular levels. Products include NMR, EPR, MRI, mass spectrometry, X-ray, microscopy, and chromatography systems. The company serves life science research, biopharmaceuticals, applied markets, clinical microbiology, molecular diagnostics, and nanotechnology through four segments: BSI BioSpin, BSI CALID, BSI NANO, and BEST.

products.name: NMR Systems
products.description: Nuclear magnetic resonance instruments ranging from benchtop to ultra-high field systems for molecular structure determination.

products.name: EPR Systems
products.description: Electron paramagnetic resonance instruments detecting unpaired electrons for materials analysis and quality control.

products.name: MRI Systems
products.description: Preclinical magnetic resonance imaging solutions for pharmaceutical research and disease studies.

products.name: MPI Systems
products.description: Magnetic particle imaging systems for real-time 3D cardiovascular disorder detection in preclinical settings.

products.name: PET Systems
products.description: Positron emission tomography instruments for oncology, neurology, and cardiovascular preclinical imaging.

products.name: SPECT Systems
products.description: Single photon emission tomography instruments for preclinical in vivo animal investigation.

products.name: CT Systems
products.description: Computed tomography instruments offering high spatial resolution for preclinical morphological imaging.

products.name: Integrated Data Solution
products.description: Vendor-agnostic platform integrating laboratory workflows, automation, and AI readiness adhering to FAIR data principles.

products.name: Lab Automation Solutions
products.description: Flexible automation and digitalization platforms for R&D and quality control in pharma-biotech and industrial markets.

products.name: Mass Spectrometry Systems
products.description: Mass spectrometry instruments for proteomics, multiomics, and life science research within the BSI CALID segment.

products.name: X-ray Systems
products.description: X-ray technology instruments for materials and life science analysis within the BSI NANO segment.

products.name: Microscopy Systems
products.description: Microscopy and metrology instruments for nanotechnology and materials science within the BSI NANO segment.

products.name: Services and Lifecycle Support
products.description: Aftermarket service and support solutions complementing Bruker's advanced instrument portfolio.
